what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for a design-source image asset named p-09 under the capital-raise path; it stores YAML metadata plus a one-line source caption.
observations: The asset is registered in the design-source channel at image://design-source/capital-raise/p-09
MIME type is image/jpeg but width and height are both 0
Source is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
The links array is empty and there is no alt text or description of the image content
standouts: Width and height are 0 despite being an image/jpeg record
Blob URI provides content-addressable storage reference
It is explicitly labeled as SOURCE design ground-truth
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed set of ledger metadata fields
Follows the image__{channel} naming and image:// addressing scheme
Includes a plain-text source caption after the frontmatter
concerns: w and h are 0, which is unusual for an image record and may indicate missing extraction
No links, alt text, or content description limits usefulness
No file size or checksum beyond the blob URI
notes: A minimal but addressable ledger stub for a capital-raise design-source image whose actual pixels live at the blob reference.
questions: Why are the image dimensions recorded as 0?
What visual content does p-09 actually contain?
Is p-09 a single page/slide in a larger capital-raise deck?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose as a design ground-truth image record matches the metadata stub, but the file does not describe the image content or verify dimensions.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register and preserve a design-source image asset for a capital-raise presentation as canonical ground truth.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable metadata record and blob pointer for a design-source image asset, supporting retrieval, provenance, and channel organization in a fused system.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger stub for a design-source JPEG image named capital-raise/p-09 with a blob reference, zero dimensions, and a source ground-truth caption.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a design-source image asset for capital-raise materials as addressable ground truth.
